tripOverview.intro: San Juan combines stunning beaches with colonial charm, making it perfect for romantic getaways. This vibrant Caribbean destination offers rainbow-friendly vibes, incredible Spanish cuisine, and endless seaside adventures.

vibe: Your week will blend romantic sunsets, vibrant culture, and endless beach time in one of the Caribbean's most LGBTQ+ welcoming destinations.

destinationOverview.bestTime: April offers perfect weather with minimal rainfall and comfortable temperatures ideal for beach activities.

attractions.name: El Yunque National Forest
attractions.desc: Tropical rainforest with waterfalls and hiking trails

attractions.name: Old San Juan
attractions.desc: Historic colonial district with colorful buildings and cobblestone streets

attractions.name: Condado Beach
attractions.desc: Popular beach with calm waters and beachfront dining

attractions.name: El Morro Fort
attractions.desc: 16th-century fortress with ocean views and rich history

destinationOverview.transportation: San Juan has reliable public buses (AMA) connecting major areas for $0.75 per ride. Taxis are readily available but can be expensive, with rides from the airport costing $20-30 to most hotels. Uber operates throughout the metro area and is often more affordable than traditional taxis.
destinationOverview.tip: Download the Uber app for reliable rides and always agree on taxi fares upfront - stay in well-lit tourist areas at night.
destinationOverview.safety: San Juan is generally safe for tourists, especially in Condado, Isla Verde, and Old San Juan areas.
destinationOverview.airaloText: Stay connected with an Airalo eSIM for seamless internet access to navigate, translate, and share your Puerto Rican adventures.

itineraryOverview.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico

days.intro: Start your romantic adventure exploring the colorful colonial streets and historic forts.

morning.name: Airport Arrival & Hotel Check-in
morning.desc: Arrive and settle into your romantic base.

afternoon.name: Old San Juan Walking Tour
afternoon.desc: Explore cobblestone streets and colorful colonial architecture.

afternoon.name: El Morro Fort
afternoon.desc: Visit this impressive 16th-century fortress with ocean views.

evening.name: Dinner at Marmalade
evening.desc: Fine dining with creative Puerto Rican cuisine.

days.tip: Book dinner reservations in advance and wear comfortable walking shoes for Old San Juan's cobblestones.

days.intro: Spend your day soaking up sun and romance at San Juan's most beautiful beaches.

morning.name: Condado Beach
morning.desc: Relax on golden sand with calm Caribbean waters.

afternoon.name: Beach Lunch at Serafina
afternoon.desc: Oceanfront dining with fresh seafood and vegetarian options.

afternoon.name: Isla Verde Beach
afternoon.desc: Continue beach hopping at this popular stretch of sand.

evening.name: Sunset at Ocean Park Beach
evening.desc: Watch a romantic sunset at this quieter beach.

evening.name: Dinner at Verde Mesa
evening.desc: Farm-to-table restaurant with excellent vegetarian menu.

days.tip: Bring reef-safe sunscreen and stay hydrated - the Caribbean sun is stronger than you think.

days.intro: Immerse yourselves in Puerto Rican art, history, and vibrant local culture.

morning.name: Museo de Arte de Puerto Rico
morning.desc: Explore the island's finest art collection in a beautiful setting.

afternoon.name: Santurce Street Art Tour
afternoon.desc: Discover incredible murals and street art in this hip neighborhood.

afternoon.name: La Placita de Santurce
afternoon.desc: Browse local shops and soak up the vibrant atmosphere.

evening.name: Happy Hour at Jungle Bird
evening.desc: Tropical cocktails at this LGBTQ+ friendly tiki bar.

evening.name: Dinner at Cocina Abierta
evening.desc: Innovative Puerto Rican cuisine with vegetarian tasting menu.

days.tip: Many museums offer free admission on certain days - check their websites for special promotions.

days.intro: Explore Puerto Rico's natural wonders with a romantic rainforest adventure.

morning.name: El Yunque National Forest
morning.desc: Hike to waterfalls in the only tropical rainforest in the US National Forest System.

afternoon.name: La Mina Falls
afternoon.desc: Take a refreshing dip in these crystal-clear natural pools.

afternoon.name: Yokahu Tower
afternoon.desc: Climb this observation tower for panoramic rainforest views.

evening.name: Return to San Juan
evening.desc: Relax during the scenic drive back to the city.

evening.name: Dinner at Santaella
evening.desc: Contemporary Puerto Rican cuisine in a stylish setting.

days.tip: Bring water shoes for the waterfall hike and pack a waterproof bag for your electronics.

days.intro: Indulge in couples treatments and intimate moments designed for romance.

morning.name: Couples Massage at Spa Zen
morning.desc: Relax together with side-by-side massages overlooking the ocean.

afternoon.name: Cueva Ventana Tour
afternoon.desc: Explore this cave with breathtaking views of the northern coast.

afternoon.name: Private Beach Time
afternoon.desc: Find a secluded spot for intimate beach moments.

evening.name: Sunset Dinner at 1919
evening.desc: Fine dining with ocean views and romantic ambiance.

evening.name: Moonlight Beach Walk
evening.desc: Stroll hand-in-hand along the moonlit shore.

days.tip: Book spa treatments in advance and consider upgrading to ocean-view suites for the ultimate romantic experience.

days.intro: Discover Puerto Rico's incredible coffee culture and traditional flavors.

morning.name: Coffee Farm Tour in Ciales
morning.desc: Learn about coffee production and taste locally grown beans.

afternoon.name: Traditional Lunch at Restaurante Raíces
afternoon.desc: Authentic Puerto Rican cuisine with excellent vegetarian mofongo.

afternoon.name: Ice Cream at Ben & Jerry's Condado
afternoon.desc: Cool down with premium ice cream flavors.

evening.name: Rum Tasting at Casa Bacardi
evening.desc: Learn about Puerto Rico's rum heritage with guided tastings.

evening.name: Farewell Dinner at Jose Enrique
evening.desc: Celebrated chef's creative take on traditional Puerto Rican dishes.

days.tip: Make reservations at Jose Enrique early - it's one of the island's most popular restaurants with limited seating.

days.intro: Spend your final full day soaking up the Caribbean sun and making lasting memories.

morning.name: Flamenco Beach Day Trip
morning.desc: Ferry to Culebra for one of the world's most beautiful beaches.

afternoon.name: Beach Picnic
afternoon.desc: Enjoy a romantic picnic on pristine white sand.

afternoon.name: Snorkeling
afternoon.desc: Explore colorful coral reefs in crystal-clear waters.

evening.name: Return Ferry
evening.desc: Scenic boat ride back to the main island.

evening.name: Final Dinner at Oceano
evening.desc: Oceanfront dining with spectacular sunset views.

days.tip: Book Culebra ferry tickets in advance and bring cash - many vendors on the island don't accept cards.

days.intro: Say goodbye to paradise with final moments together before heading home.

morning.name: Hotel Checkout
morning.desc: Pack memories and prepare for departure.

morning.name: Last-minute Shopping
morning.desc: Pick up coffee, rum, and souvenirs at local markets.

afternoon.name: Airport Transfer
afternoon.desc: Head to Luis Muñoz Marín International Airport.

afternoon.name: Flight Departure
afternoon.desc: Begin your journey back to Philadelphia.

days.tip: Arrive at the airport 2 hours early for domestic flights and keep receipts for any purchases over $500.

food.intro: San Juan's culinary scene blends traditional Puerto Rican flavors with international influences, offering excellent vegetarian options and world-class coffee.
food.tip: Tipping 18-20% is standard at restaurants, and many establishments offer excellent vegetarian versions of traditional dishes like mofongo.

neighborhoods.name: Condado
neighborhoods.desc: Beachfront district with luxury hotels, restaurants, and nightlife
neighborhoods.whyStay: Walking distance to beach, dining, and romantic sunset spots

neighborhoods.name: Old San Juan
neighborhoods.desc: Historic colonial area with cobblestone streets and cultural attractions
neighborhoods.whyStay: Immersive historical experience with charming architecture

neighborhoods.name: Isla Verde
neighborhoods.desc: Modern beach area near the airport with resort-style accommodations
neighborhoods.whyStay: Easy airport access with beautiful beach and dining options

hotels.tip: Book accommodations in Condado for the best balance of beach access, dining, and LGBTQ+ friendly atmosphere.

getYourGuide.name: Bioluminescent Bay Kayaking
getYourGuide.desc: Night tour to see glowing waters in Laguna Grande near Fajardo.

getYourGuide.name: El Yunque Rainforest Adventure
getYourGuide.desc: Guided hiking tour with waterfall swimming and local insights.

getYourGuide.name: Old San Juan Food and Culture Tour
getYourGuide.desc: Walking tour combining history, architecture, and traditional Puerto Rican cuisine.

hiddenGems.name: Paseo de la Princesa
hiddenGems.desc: Romantic waterfront promenade perfect for sunset walks and couples photos.

hiddenGems.name: Cueva Ventana
hiddenGems.desc: Cave system offering breathtaking views of Puerto Rico's northern coast and valleys.

hiddenGems.name: Ocean Park Beach
hiddenGems.desc: Quieter beach area favored by locals, ideal for romantic moments away from crowds.

packing.title: April in San Juan, Puerto Rico
packing.intro: Pack light, breathable clothing for warm tropical weather with minimal rainfall expected.
packing.luggage: A carry-on suitcase plus personal item should be sufficient for this week-long tropical getaway.
packing.tip: Pack reef-safe sunscreen to protect marine life, and bring a waterproof bag for beach days and rainforest adventures.

bookTrip.intro: Expect to pay around $400-600 per person for flights from Philadelphia to San Juan in April.
